description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of estate_survey_maps to early modern private estate/manor survey maps produced from land surveying.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the 1596 surveying-by-plan discussion cited in History of Cartography, not to the unrelated 1614 atlas/logarithm placeholder.
Private estate maps do not require a state cadastral survey program as a direct prerequisite.
Estate maps were usually manuscript land-management maps, not bound printed map atlases.
Cadastral tax maps are public fiscal land-register maps, not a direct prerequisite for individual private estate maps.
The source-backed estate-map mechanism is surveying and measuring land.
